reasoning: This animation sequence will depict a slight adjustment of the arms to emphasize the beard in the emoji. It's a subtle gesture, focusing on a small shift in posture rather than large, sweeping movements. The overall effect should be one of quiet confidence and self-assuredness, reflecting the image of a man with a beard. Frame 1 will start with the arms hanging loosely at the sides, palms facing inward. This sets a neutral baseline for the animation. Frame 2 will have the arms move slightly forward and upward, as if the person is subtly adjusting their posture to highlight the beard. The palms will remain facing inward. Frame 3 will show a slight rotation of the arms outward at the shoulders, as if the person is presenting themselves with a degree of self-satisfaction. The palms will remain facing inward. Frame 4 will return the arms to a slightly more relaxed position, similar to Frame 2, but with a more neutral orientation at the shoulders. This return to a slightly less accentuated position adds a natural flow to the movement. Frame 5 will conclude the sequence by returning the arms to their original, neutral position in Frame 1. This final frame reinforces the subtle and understated nature of the gesture. The subtle movements throughout the sequence will convey a sense of quiet confidence and self-assuredness.
